pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Cover page: A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, wearing a light pink spring dress with a pink bow on her ear) sitting on a grassy hill, happily wiggling her bare feet in the air, showing adorable pink paw pads on the soles of her feet. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) sits beside her smiling. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) perches on NOMI's head. Sunny spring day, flowers blooming, cheerful and warm atmosphere. Title area at top.

pages.text: 咘咘最不喜欢穿鞋子了！每天早上，Tina妈妈帮她穿好鞋，她就偷偷把鞋踢掉。
pages.text_en: Bubu hated wearing shoes! Every morning, Mama Tina helped her put on shoes, but she'd secretly kick them off.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Indoor scene, a cozy living room. A black-and-white cow mom (Tina, classic black-and-white Holstein pattern, wearing an elegant spring knit cardigan and skirt) is kneeling down trying to put small pink shoes on a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear). Bubu has a mischievous grin and is kicking one shoe off with her bare foot, showing cute pink paw pads. The kicked shoe flies through the air. Warm morning light from a window.

pages.text: "咘咘，外面要穿鞋哦！"妈妈温柔地说。可咘咘摇摇头："不要不要，光脚最舒服啦！"
pages.text_en: "Bubu, you need to wear shoes outside!" Mom said gently. But Bubu shook her head: "No no, bare feet are the comfiest!"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A black-and-white cow mom (Tina, classic black-and-white Holstein pattern, elegant spring cardigan and skirt) standing at the front door holding a pair of small pink shoes, looking lovingly at a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) who is shaking her head defiantly with arms crossed, bare feet with cute pink paw pads visible on the wooden floor. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) watches from behind with an amused expression. Bright doorway with spring sunshine outside.

pages.text: 咘咘光着脚去公园玩。她跑啊跑，突然——"哎呀好痛！"一颗小石子扎到了咘咘的脚。
pages.text_en: Bubu went to the park barefoot. She ran and ran, until suddenly — "Ouch, that hurts!" A little pebble poked her foot.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) in a park on a gravel path, hopping on one foot with a pained expression, tears forming in her eyes. She holds up one bare foot showing cute pink paw pads with a small pebble stuck to it. The park has green trees, flowers, playground equipment in background. Spring daytime, bright and colorful. Close-up view emphasizing her hurt expression and bare foot.

pages.text: NOMI赶紧跑过来，轻轻帮咘咘把小石子拿掉。"还疼吗？"NOMI心疼地问。咘咘揉揉脚："有一点点……"
pages.text_en: NOMI rushed over and gently removed the pebble. "Does it still hurt?" NOMI asked with concern. Bubu rubbed her foot: "Just a little..."
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) kneeling on a park path, gently holding the small bare foot of a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) who is sitting on the ground. NOMI carefully picks a tiny pebble from Bubu's cute pink paw pad. Bubu looks a bit teary but trusting. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) hovers nearby looking worried. Soft spring sunlight, green park background.

pages.text: 后来，咘咘光着脚去了超市。超市的地板好冰好冰——"阿嚏！"咘咘打了一个大喷嚏。
pages.text_en: Later, Bubu went to the supermarket barefoot. The floor was so cold — "Achoo!" Bubu sneezed a big sneeze.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Inside a bright supermarket with colorful shelves of products. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) standing barefoot on shiny cold tile floor, sneezing dramatically with eyes squeezed shut, ears blown back by the force of the sneeze. Her bare feet with pink paw pads are on the icy-looking white tile. Cold blue tint on the floor area contrasting with warm store lighting above. Exaggerated funny sneeze pose, comedic moment.

pages.text: 又有一天，咘咘光着脚去沙滩。沙子被太阳晒得好烫好烫！"哇哇哇！烫烫烫！"咘咘跳来跳去。
pages.text_en: Another day, Bubu went to the beach barefoot. The sand was scorching hot from the sun! "Ow ow ow! Hot hot hot!" Bubu hopped around.
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A sunny beach scene. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) hopping from foot to foot on hot golden sand, both feet lifted alternately, face scrunched up in discomfort, mouth open yelling. Visible heat waves rising from the sand. Her pink paw pads are red from the heat. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) rushes toward her with arms outstretched. Blue ocean and bright sun in background. Comedic, dynamic pose.

pages.text: NOMI抱起咘咘说："走，我们去找一双你最喜欢的鞋！"咘咘歪着头想了想："真的会有我喜欢的鞋吗？"
pages.text_en: NOMI picked up Bubu and said: "Come on, let's find a pair of shoes you'll love!" Bubu tilted her head: "Are there really shoes I'd like?"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) carrying a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) in her arms. Bubu tilts her head curiously with one ear flopped. They are walking on a cheerful street toward a colorful shoe store with a big shoe-shaped sign. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) flies ahead showing the way. Warm spring afternoon light, pastel-colored buildings.

pages.text: 鞋店里有好多好多鞋！红的、蓝的、黄的……咘咘的眼睛都看花了。突然她看到一双小兔子鞋——白白的，有长耳朵，还有粉色蝴蝶结！
pages.text_en: The shoe store had so many shoes! Red, blue, yellow... Bubu's eyes went wide. Suddenly she spotted a pair of bunny shoes — white with long ears and a pink bow!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Inside a magical, colorful children's shoe store with rainbow shelves full of bright shoes of all colors and styles. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) standing in the middle of the store, eyes sparkling with excitement, pointing at a special pair of white bunny-shaped shoes on a glowing display pedestal. The bunny shoes are white with long rabbit ears and tiny pink bows, looking just like little rabbits. Sparkles and stars around the special shoes. Vibrant, magical, wonder-filled atmosphere.

pages.text: "就是这双！"咘咘开心地穿上小兔子鞋。她跑了两步——哇，好轻好软！她跳了一下——哇，跳得好高！
pages.text_en: "These ones!" Bubu happily put on the bunny shoes. She took two steps — wow, so light and soft! She jumped — wow, so high!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) jumping high in the air with pure joy, wearing adorable white bunny-shaped shoes with long ears and pink bows on them. She is mid-leap, arms spread wide, huge delighted smile, ears flying up. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) claps happily below. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) flies excitedly around Bubu. Inside the colorful shoe store, sparkle effects around her feet. Dynamic, joyful, triumphant moment.

pages.text: 从那以后，咘咘每天都开开心心地穿着小兔子鞋出门。去公园不怕石子，去超市不怕冰凉，去沙滩也不怕烫了！
pages.text_en: From then on, Bubu happily wore her bunny shoes every day. No more pebbles in the park, no cold floors in the supermarket, no hot sand at the beach!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A triple-scene split composition showing a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) wearing white bunny shoes with pink bows, confidently and happily in three settings: top section shows her running on a park path over pebbles with a smile, middle section shows her walking on supermarket tile floor comfortably, bottom section shows her playing on beach sand without pain. All three mini-scenes connected by a flowing path. Bright, cheerful, triumphant montage feel. NOMI raccoon and NONO red bird appear as small figures accompanying her.

pages.text: 不过呀，回到家，咘咘还是第一个把鞋脱掉，光着脚踩在软软的地毯上。因为——家里是最安全的地方呀！
pages.text_en: But at home, Bubu was always the first to kick off her shoes and walk barefoot on the soft carpet. Because — home is the safest place of all!
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A cozy warm living room scene. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink spring dress, pink bow on ear) walking barefoot on a fluffy cream-colored carpet with a blissful smile, eyes half-closed in comfort, wiggling her toes showing cute pink paw pads. Her white bunny shoes with pink bows are neatly placed by the front door. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped light sweater) sits on the couch smiling warmly. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) is nestled on a cushion. Golden evening light through the window. Warm, safe, home feeling. The end.
